sqlMap.select: select * from AreaOfPractice where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOPKey = #AOPKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into AreaOfPractice(VersionSequence, PolicyKey, AOPKey PercentageValue AOPCommentDesc ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC#, #AOPKey:NUMERIC# #PercentageValue# #AOPCommentDesc# )
sqlMap.select: select PercentageValue, AOPCommentDesc, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, AOPKey from AreaOfPractice where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOPKey = #AOPKey#
sqlMap.update:
update AreaOfPractice set
PercentageValue = #PercentageValue# PercentageValue = null AOPCommentDesc = #AOPCommentDesc# AOPCommentDesc = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOPKey = #AOPKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from AreaOfPractice where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOPKey = #AOPKey#
delete from AreaOfPractice where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOPKey = #AOPKey#
sqlMap.select: select PercentageValue, AOPCommentDesc, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, AOPKey from AreaOfPractice where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOPKey = #AOPKey#
select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, AOPKey, PercentageValue, AOPCommentDesc from AreaOfPractice where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOPKey = #AOPKey#
